svg.text: Best run AL-20260329-026 reached 1.3614 val_bpb. 30 scored runs are tracked here, with 11 kept and 19 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260329-026 (keep) tested the `q4/kv2` frontier may be output-path-limited, and untied embeddings plus a separate output head could buy enough expressivity to win.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
